claim: Gemini 3 Flash for audio understanding: one API call extracts speaker labels, timestamps, emotion tags, language detection with translation, and summary.
actionable: Use Gemini 3 Flash with structured outputs for audio analysis; request speaker labels, language detection, emotion, and summary in a single API call.
source_title: From Transcription to Live Music: Gemini's Audio Stack — Thor Schaeff, Google DeepMind

claim: Director's note for speech generation: guide voice generation through text prompts (e.g., 'Irish accent, cozy pub setting') rather than selecting from voice library.
actionable: Use director's notes to customize TTS voices for context; describe the scene, emotion, and accent rather than picking a generic voice preset.
source_title: From Transcription to Live Music: Gemini's Audio Stack — Thor Schaeff, Google DeepMind

claim: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: sound-to-sound real-time multimodal model with reasoning baked in (not cascaded through separate LLM).
actionable: Use Gemini 3.1 Flash Live for real-time audio interactions; it handles text, voice, and video input simultaneously with low latency.
source_title: From Transcription to Live Music: Gemini's Audio Stack — Thor Schaeff, Google DeepMind

claim: Gemini Live inference speed: single-frame-per-second video ingestion for real-time multimodal interactions (web socket connection).
actionable: For video-aware agents, use Gemini Live with max 1 frame/second; this is sufficient for describing visual scenes in real-time conversation.
source_title: From Transcription to Live Music: Gemini's Audio Stack — Thor Schaeff, Google DeepMind

claim: Lyria 3 music generation: can generate full-length songs with lyrics; Lyria 3 Clip for 30-second jingles, Lyria 3 Pro for full songs.
actionable: Use Lyria 3 Pro for full song generation with lyrics in multi-language scenarios; Lyria 3 Clip for short promotional audio.
source_title: From Transcription to Live Music: Gemini's Audio Stack — Thor Schaeff, Google DeepMind

claim: Agents can call music generation tools: Gemini Live agents can use Lyria 3 via tool use to generate songs on request during conversation.
actionable: Add Lyria 3 as a tool in your agent; users can request songs and the agent generates them synchronously.
source_title: From Transcription to Live Music: Gemini's Audio Stack — Thor Schaeff, Google DeepMind
